title: Stardew Village 3
description: Cozy farming like Stardew Valley or adventures like Terraria, this modpack got it all!
body:
![stardew village 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd6ddc515d069fc88af80b2d8a2fa0e6af4bd620_0.webp)
#
Step into a **<font color="ForestGreen"> Stardew Valley-inspired** </font> world where you can **<font color="ForestGreen"> grow crops** </font>, raise over 30 different **<font color="OrangeRed"> Animals** </font>, make friends with villagers, and build your own town.

If you prefer **<font color="Crimson"> adventure** </font>, explore **<font color="Crimson"> Terraria-like** </font> lands filled with **<font color="Crimson"> new enemies** </font>, **unique biomes**, and **<font color="Crimson"> tough bosses**</font>, while collecting a **<font color="Gold"> special ingame currency** </font>.

**<font color="ForestGreen"> Plant** </font> and **<font color="ForestGreen"> harvest new crops** </font> as the **<font color="LightSalmon"> seasons** </font> change, and manage your **<font color="Cyan">temperature** </font> to stay warm in winter.

Enjoy **better graphics** with **improved** water, screen effects, and particles.
**Invite friends to join your world** and chat with them using **built-in voice chat**. Experience **realistic sounds** in different environments.
#
![stardew village 3 city](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lh7hiS5g/images/1c3540999f64fe664c728f418f1085a513850dc2.jpeg)

#
走进星露谷风格的世界，在这里您可以种植庄稼、饲养 30 多种不同的动物、与村民交朋友并建立自己的城镇。

如果您喜欢冒险，请探索充满新敌人、独特生物群落和强大 Boss 的类似 Terraria 的土地，同时收集特殊的游戏货币。

随着季节变化种植和收获新作物，并管理温度以在冬天保持温暖。

享受更好的图形，改进水、屏幕效果和粒子。邀请朋友加入您的世界并使用内置语音聊天与他们聊天。体验不同环境中逼真的声音。
